meta.intent: Test first-read readability on a larger board by presenting big outer clears that feel productive while the real progress lives in the narrow middle lane.
meta.expectedPath: Read the center first, use the small top A entry to start opening the middle, then route through the stacked central targets instead of farming the broad side columns.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player keeps taking the satisfying left and right side clears, feels busy, and wastes too many actions before the center route is meaningfully open.
meta.whatItProves: The player can orient in a larger greybox without the game turning mushy.
meta.notes: The blocker count is intentionally concentrated around the centerline so the board reads bigger, not denser; the side columns are there to tempt broad but low-value clears.
